creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


OptionsNG conversion committed, thanks! 

Remark: I don't buy the use of "PORTEXAMPLES=*" (and I wish I never used 
it for DOCS), because I find interessing to trace the evolution of plist 
from one version to another. Also, don't put @ to mask the instructions.
